title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. acutiserratum
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. acutiserratum, also known as a subspecies of hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits associated with Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. acutiserratum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and even help with wound healing. In herbal preparations, this plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
